steps.name: service-line-coverage-rerank
steps.summary: WCD1 added scripts/workflow_coverage_depth_rerank.py, tests/test_workflow_coverage_depth_rerank.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-wcd1-service-line-coverage-rerank.md. It ranks firm-service workflow gaps by automation value, evidence availability, implementation cost, and public-safety boundary, selecting audit_disclosure_tie_out across F-AUD/F-ACC for WCD2.

steps.name: workflow-sample-contract-pack
steps.summary: WCD2 added scripts/workflow_sample_contract_pack.py, tests/test_workflow_sample_contract_pack.py, and docs/reports/2026-07-05-wcd2-workflow-sample-contract-pack.md. It defines the audit_disclosure_tie_out workflow contract with public-safe input facts, authority needs, output surface, review boundary, and failure states for the next minimal adapter.
